responsibilities: Implement and reproduce cutting-edge research papers, adapting algorithms to internal infrastructure and datasets
Build robust, reusable experimental pipelines that accelerate iteration speed for research scientists
Collaborate with research scientists to design and execute large-scale experiments testing novel hypotheses
Optimize training code for performance and scalability across multi-GPU and multi-node compute clusters
Develop internal tooling and libraries that streamline data preprocessing, training, and evaluation workflows
Debug and resolve numerical instability, convergence issues, and performance bottlenecks in training runs
Translate promising research prototypes into production-quality, well-tested, and documented code
Contribute to open-source research codebases and internal benchmarking suites used across the organization
Profile GPU and memory utilization to identify and eliminate inefficiencies in large-scale training jobs
Partner with infrastructure teams to scale experimental compute resources for growing research demands
